Video.summary: Even when there's rain or mud, these monster trucks bring their A-Game. Get down and dirty with this compilation of muddy Monster Jam trucks! AND - Witness some of the best freestyles ever to hit the World Finals field from 2000 to 2011.
Video.title: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Image.alt: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2001 season concludes with the second World Finals competition- don't miss the racing action from your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals II - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Angel stadium hosts this weeks drivers for week six of the Championship Series.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Freestyle action from a jam-packed Ford Field stadium in Detroit, MI, on January 20, 2007.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on January 13, 2018!
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam racing and freestyle action from the Moda Center on February 26, 2017!
Video.title: Moda Center - Portland, OR - Triple Threat

Image.alt: Moda Center - Portland, OR - Triple Threat
Moda Center - Portland, OR - Triple Threat
Moda Center - Portland, OR - Triple Threat

Video.summary: The tour makes its first ever stop in Wales and sees some veteran faces take the course.
Video.title: Principality Stadium - Cardiff, Wales

Video.summary: All the Monster Jam action is back at Carrier Dome in Syracuse, NY during the 2019 Championship Series!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 16 of the Stadium Championship Series, at LoanDepot Park in Miami, FL.
Video.title: LoanDepot Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue roars into to NRG Stadium for Round 5 of the 2023 season. Can Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga continue to dominate the series and extend his 15-race winning streak? Will Colt Stephens triumph in his hometown with a heroic return to Texas in ThunderROARus? All that and more when Monster Jam heads to Houston for Round 5.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Racing, donuts, freestyle and special guests as Monster Jam visits AT&T Stadium.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Don't miss all the Monster Jam freestyle action from the Mercedes-Benz Superdome on February 23, 2013.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Image.alt: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle
Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle
Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: The 2017 season of Monster Jam races into the Carrier Dome with more racing and freestyle action from all your favorite drivers and trucks!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: In a continuation of events, don't miss the freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on February 2, 2013.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes next level with ATV's, Speedsters and freestyle in day one at the Amalie Arena in Tampa.
Video.title: Amalie Arena - Tampa, FL - Part 1

Video.summary: Monster Jam returns to US Bank Stadium with Stadium Championship Series East. A resurgent Todd LeDuc has Megalodon primed for back-to-back event championships while Tyler Menninga looks to bounce back from mechanical issues that nearly cost Grave Digger the series points lead.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Buckle in for all the Monster Jam racing action from Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 28, 2012.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam trucks spatter the Ford Field walls with mud.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: A huge field of some of the world's greatest freestyling monster trucks battle for a shot at victory at Alltel Stadium.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: The competition heats up at Detroit's Ford Field.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Ford Field is packed for all the thrilling racing action, on March 4, 2006.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: The fun doesn't stop as Monster Jam continues in New Orleans- this time with freestyle action that just won't quit!
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam visits Reliant Stadium in Houston, TX, continuing the 2012 season.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Check out all the action of the XIX World Finals and see who is crowned champion.
Video.title: World Finals XIX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Image.alt: World Finals XIX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
World Finals XIX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV
World Finals XIX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV

Video.summary: US Bank Stadium in Minneapolis, MN is host to Monster Jam for more skills, racing, and freestyle action!
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez leads the charge as Arena Championship Series West heads to the Golden 1 Center in Sacramento, California. Lainez will need to hold off Earth Shaker’s Tristan England who looks to reclaim the top spot in the series points standings.
Video.title: Golden 1 Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: Terminal Velocity’s Jon Zimmer Jr. looks to tighten the gap in the series points standings as Arena Championship Central heads to Cleveland, Ohio. Grave Digger's Matt Cody makes his 2023 domestic debut as he attempts to keep the points lead with the black and green wrecking machine.
Video.title: Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH

Image.alt: Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH
Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH
Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH

Video.summary: Racing, skills, and freestyle action are in store during Monster Jam's visit to Seattle, WA.
Video.title: Lumen Field - Seattle, WA
